title: European B2B SaaS teams still hire around spreadsheet-heavy reporting before the RevOps system is clean
summary: A public research note on how RevOps hiring often shows up before reporting, dashboards, and CRM workflows are fully systematized.
contextLine: Updated from EnrichAnything market scans · live snapshot from March 25, 2026
dataNote: Built from the latest published EnrichAnything market scan.
citationText: Based on EnrichAnything's latest scan of matching companies, 100% already include an explicit gap signal and 100% include a timing note.
